title: tragia angustifolia var. genuina
intro: Tragia angustifolia var. genuina, also known as the Narrowleaf Tragia, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its narrow leaves and small yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tragia angustifolia var. genuina include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Tragia angustifolia var. genuina include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made from the leaves, roots, or entire plant.
